pr.title: Loss function comparison (CE vs P2 variants) under parameter-golf constraints

output.summary: GPT11x512 employs P2 difficulty-aware loss, wallclock-aligned warmdown, residual mixing with a conv token mixer, and Muon+Adam split under compression-aware QAT.
techniques: P2 loss for low-confidence token focus
wallclock-aware warmdown plus late QAT toward int6 targets
residual mixing and conv token mixer with Muon/Adam optimizer split
